messages.content: Classify support tickets into one of: billing, product_bug, account_access, feature_request, other. Return JSON with keys label and reason.
I was charged twice after upgrading my plan.
{"label":"billing","reason":"duplicate charge after upgrade"}
Classify support tickets into one of: billing, product_bug, account_access, feature_request, other. Return JSON with keys label and reason.
The app crashes every time I export a CSV from the analytics page.
{"label":"product_bug","reason":"reproducible crash during export"}
Classify support tickets into one of: billing, product_bug, account_access, feature_request, other. Return JSON with keys label and reason.
I changed phones and now I cannot get past MFA.
{"label":"account_access","reason":"user cannot complete login because MFA blocks access"}
Classify support tickets into one of: billing, product_bug, account_access, feature_request, other. Return JSON with keys label and reason.
Please add the option to schedule reports for the first Monday of every month.
{"label":"feature_request","reason":"user is asking for a new scheduling capability"}

{"label":"other","reason":"request does not fit billing, product, access, or feature categories"}
